title: Seplat Energy Leadership Visits Executive Governor of Edo State, Mr. Godwin Obaseki
description: Seplat Energy Plc and the Edo State government have agreed to deepen their partnership towards improved social, economic and environmental development. This was part of the discussions during a courte
html: Seplat Energy Plc and the Edo State government have agreed to deepen their partnership towards improved social, economic and environmental development. This was part of the discussions during a courtesy visit to the Executive Governor of Edo State, Godwin Obaseki by a team of Seplat board and management, led by the Chairman, Basil Omiyi.
